view_title: ขยาย F2,F5 (2-pile and 5-pile caps)
schema_note: Same custom-field convention as house #2 (element_type:footing with dowel_bar/tie_bar/pile_count). pedestal always 0.20x0.20 in this house per S-08 column schedule.

dowel_bar.note: 5+5Ø12mm printed as two leader lines -- read as top+bottom layer of a 2-layer mat, 10 bars total, same interpretation as house #2's analogous F5/F6 case

warnings: F5's dowel bar count (10 vs. possibly 5) needs human zoom review, same open question as house #2's F5/F6 pile caps.
